items.summary: Removed the extra Not in scope exclusion 'Expanding authority beyond the validated request and governing contracts' so the scope exclusions realign concept-for-concept with the role contract.

Standardized the canonical qualifier in the material pushback definition from 'latest active review evidence' to 'latest required review evidence' to match reviewer-clear and result-evidence language.

Addressed the actual carried-forward scope-alignment defect directly by removing the unmatched scope exclusion in <scope>; the existing reviewer-clear improvements remain valid but are no longer treated as the fix for this item.
